comment: Authoritative source for the format:<name> Buffer post tag values. Skills MUST use only these values; buffer-stats Phase 5 expects them. Adding a new format means editing this file AND ARCHITECTURE.md's format-tag table AND buffer-stats Phase 5 expected-tags list.

verbatim_quote.description: Direct excerpt from a beehiiv article body. No paraphrasing.

teaser.description: Original copy summarizing the article without spoiling the punchline. No verbatim drift.

link_share.description: Single GitHub contribution as an impact-framed post + link.

batch_summary.description: Multiple GitHub contributions unified by a theme sentence.

long_form_pulse.description: Reserved for a future skill that schedules a Buffer companion announcement post for a published LinkedIn pulse article. crosspost-newsletter publishes pulse articles directly to LinkedIn (not via Buffer), so its outputs are NOT tagged with this; closed-loop attribution for native pulse posts comes from linkedin-stats.
